nodes.label: ₹5,000 ≤ ₹25k → chain ends at FIN_L2 (Finance L2 is final payer).
nodes.norm_label: ₹5,000 ≤ ₹25k → chain ends at fin_l2 (finance l2 is final payer).

nodes.label: ₹25,000 exactly hits FIN_L2 limit — Finance L2 is still final.
nodes.norm_label: ₹25,000 exactly hits fin_l2 limit — finance l2 is still final.

nodes.label: ₹25,001 exceeds FIN_L2 limit → Finance Admin is final payer.
nodes.norm_label: ₹25,001 exceeds fin_l2 limit → finance admin is final payer.

nodes.label: ₹2,00,000 exactly hits FIN_HEAD limit — Finance Admin is still final.
nodes.norm_label: ₹2,00,000 exactly hits fin_head limit — finance admin is still final.

nodes.label: ₹2,00,001 exceeds FIN_HEAD limit → CFO must approve.
nodes.norm_label: ₹2,00,001 exceeds fin_head limit → cfo must approve.

nodes.label: L1, L2, HOD, FIN_L1 must appear in every chain regardless of amount.
nodes.norm_label: l1, l2, hod, fin_l1 must appear in every chain regardless of amount.

nodes.label: Without any policy limits configured, every bill gets the full 7-step chain.
nodes.norm_label: without any policy limits configured, every bill gets the full 7-step chain.

nodes.label: When HOD files on behalf of vendor, L1 and L2 are skipped.
nodes.norm_label: when hod files on behalf of vendor, l1 and l2 are skipped.

nodes.label: Finance Manager filing on behalf skips L1, L2, HOD.
nodes.norm_label: finance manager filing on behalf skips l1, l2, hod.

nodes.label: When a vendor submits a bill, it must appear in the L1 approver's queue.
nodes.norm_label: when a vendor submits a bill, it must appear in the l1 approver's queue.

nodes.label: Vendor submits → expense status = PENDING_L1, step 1 assigned to l1_approver.
nodes.norm_label: vendor submits → expense status = pending_l1, step 1 assigned to l1_approver.

nodes.label: Bill submitted by vendor must appear in l1_approver's finance queue.
nodes.norm_label: bill submitted by vendor must appear in l1_approver's finance queue.

nodes.label: Bill should NOT be in L2 queue until L1 has approved.
nodes.norm_label: bill should not be in l2 queue until l1 has approved.

nodes.label: Bill should NOT be in HOD queue until L1+L2 approve.
nodes.norm_label: bill should not be in hod queue until l1+l2 approve.

nodes.label: Full approval + payment flow for a ₹15k bill. Finance L2 is final payer.
nodes.norm_label: full approval + payment flow for a ₹15k bill. finance l2 is final payer.

nodes.label: ₹15k bill: vendor → L1 → L2 → HOD → FinL1 → FinL2 (pay) → PAID.
nodes.norm_label: ₹15k bill: vendor → l1 → l2 → hod → finl1 → finl2 (pay) → paid.

nodes.label: Each approver sees the bill only at their step; queue clears after they approve.
nodes.norm_label: each approver sees the bill only at their step; queue clears after they approve.

nodes.label: ₹5L bill: full chain through Finance Admin as final payer.
nodes.norm_label: ₹5l bill: full chain through finance admin as final payer.

nodes.label: ₹5L bill must pass through FIN_L2 and reach PENDING_FIN_HEAD before APPROVED.
nodes.norm_label: ₹5l bill must pass through fin_l2 and reach pending_fin_head before approved.

nodes.label: Vendor must see payment_due_date and UTR on their bill detail.
nodes.norm_label: vendor must see payment_due_date and utr on their bill detail.

nodes.label: Fast-forward bill through all approvals to PAYMENT_INITIATED.
nodes.norm_label: fast-forward bill through all approvals to payment_initiated.

nodes.label: After payment is initiated, vendor can see payment_due_date on their bill.
nodes.norm_label: after payment is initiated, vendor can see payment_due_date on their bill.

nodes.label: After Finance Admin marks paid, vendor can see UTR on their bill.
nodes.norm_label: after finance admin marks paid, vendor can see utr on their bill.

nodes.label: Any approver can reject; bill goes terminal.
nodes.norm_label: any approver can reject; bill goes terminal.

nodes.label: L1 rejects → bill becomes REJECTED, disappears from all queues.
nodes.norm_label: l1 rejects → bill becomes rejected, disappears from all queues.

nodes.label: Rejection without a meaningful reason (≥10 chars) must be rejected.
nodes.norm_label: rejection without a meaningful reason (≥10 chars) must be rejected.

nodes.label: HOD can file a bill on behalf of vendor; L1/L2 steps are skipped.
nodes.norm_label: hod can file a bill on behalf of vendor; l1/l2 steps are skipped.

nodes.label: Bill filed by HOD on behalf of vendor starts at PENDING_HOD, not L1.
nodes.norm_label: bill filed by hod on behalf of vendor starts at pending_hod, not l1.

nodes.label: HOD who filed the bill can approve the HOD step (SoD exception for administrativ
nodes.norm_label: hod who filed the bill can approve the hod step (sod exception for administrativ

nodes.label: Bad-path tests: privilege escalation, SoD violations, unauthorized actions.
nodes.norm_label: bad-path tests: privilege escalation, sod violations, unauthorized actions.

nodes.label: Vendor must not be able to approve any invoice.
nodes.norm_label: vendor must not be able to approve any invoice.

nodes.label: Employee who submitted cannot be the L1 approver (SoD).
nodes.norm_label: employee who submitted cannot be the l1 approver (sod).

nodes.label: L2 must not be able to approve when bill is at PENDING_L1.
nodes.norm_label: l2 must not be able to approve when bill is at pending_l1.

nodes.label: Mark-paid must reject request if UTR is not provided.
nodes.norm_label: mark-paid must reject request if utr is not provided.

nodes.label: Vendor must only see their own bills, not another vendor's.
nodes.norm_label: vendor must only see their own bills, not another vendor's.

nodes.label: Only Finance Admin or CFO can configure approval policy limits.
nodes.norm_label: only finance admin or cfo can configure approval policy limits.

nodes.label: Finance Admin / CFO can read and write approval limits.
nodes.norm_label: finance admin / cfo can read and write approval limits.

nodes.label: Finance Admin can list all policy limits.
nodes.norm_label: finance admin can list all policy limits.

nodes.label: Setting limits for L1, L2, HOD, FIN_L1 must be rejected.
nodes.norm_label: setting limits for l1, l2, hod, fin_l1 must be rejected.

nodes.label: CFO can update Finance L2 limit.
nodes.norm_label: cfo can update finance l2 limit.

nodes.label: After submission and approvals, current_step must always be consistent.
nodes.norm_label: after submission and approvals, current_step must always be consistent.

nodes.label: current_step must equal the active step level after every approval.
nodes.norm_label: current_step must equal the active step level after every approval.

nodes.label: After rejection, no further approver should see the bill in their queue.
nodes.norm_label: after rejection, no further approver should see the bill in their queue.

nodes.norm_label: build a visual timeline from approval steps + status.
